name: visus-mcp
description: Security-first web access for Claude. Strips prompt injection attacks, redacts PII, and reduces token consumption by up to 70% before content enters your context window.
longDescription: Visus is a pre-filter MCP server that sanitizes web content before it reaches Claude. It detects 43 categories of prompt injection patterns (mapped to OWASP LLM Top 10, NIST AI 600-1, MITRE ATLAS, and ISO/IEC 42001:2023), redacts PII (email, phone, SSN, CC, IP), and uses Mozilla Readability to strip nav bars, ads, and boilerplate — reducing token consumption by up to 70% on content-heavy pages.
author: Leo Chongolnee

install.note: No API key required. Open-source tier is fully functional out of the box.

tools.name: visus_fetch
tools.description: Fetch and sanitize a web page with automatic format detection (HTML/JSON/XML/RSS). Includes threat report when injection or PII is detected.

tools.name: visus_read
tools.description: Extract clean article content using Mozilla Readability (~70% token reduction). Strips nav, ads, and boilerplate.

tools.name: visus_search
tools.description: Search the web via DuckDuckGo with injection and PII sanitization applied to all results before they reach the LLM.

tools.name: visus_fetch_structured
tools.description: Extract structured data from a web page according to a user-defined schema. All fields are independently sanitized.
